creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
I understand a lot of this is blocked while various python things get addressed.

But the version of ansible in base is now vulnerable to a number of CVEs, more
than 2 years behind, and not supported upstream either.

Is there any way we can accommodate both setuptools versions?

for my limited needs this was sufficient:

c617f72a091e sysutils/ansible: update to 11.4.0
cf28376e7c1a sysutils/py-ansible-core: update to 2.18.4
ea6fd2715df7 sysutils/py-ansible-runner: update to 2.4.1, use new distname
c24cea47fecb devel/py-setuptools: update to 78.1.0
